creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Best hike in Denmark 🇩🇰👇

This incredible hike in Bornholm is known as “Around the Hammer”, and it’s hands down the best walk you can ever do in Denmark 🙌

Halfway on the route, there’s a little harbour where there are public toilets and a sandwich shop, so you don’t have to bring your own food. There’s also a restaurant at the visitor centre next to Hammershus (the castle) ✌️

Starting point for Google Maps: 📍Sandvig Strand (Sandvig Beach)
 Midway point:  📍Hammershus (the castle)  Midway point 2: 📍Opalsøen (the Opal lake)  The route ends back at Sandvig Beach, which isn’t the best beach in Bornholm, but it’s all right for a quick swim - and there’s a pretty impressive little kiosk where you can get a drink or two 😎

The walk is around 10 kilometers depending on the trail you’re taking - it’s a fairly easy hike that you can just do in normal shoes 🤝

#bornholm #denmarktravel #traveltips

transcription.text: I think I found the most beautiful hike in Denmark. We're on the beautiful island of Bornholm all the way up north. The hike is around an area called The Hammer that was shaped during the last ice ages here in Denmark. You're basically walking past some of the most beautiful places in the country as well as one of the largest castle ruins in northern Europe. A 10 out of 10 hike in my opinion.
